title: Inter-layer transition forming machine for winding of large-sized superconducting coils
assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS
status_note: Active, expires 2041-09-26 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: hydraulic interlayer-transition forming machine for large SC coils
indep_claim_gist: Machine with fixed plate and vertically/horizontally movable forming mechanisms using dual-action hydraulic cylinders and wedge clamps to bend superconducting conductor at inter-layer transitions of double-pancake winding.
notes: CAS winding-line seed re-fetched this run. US grant of HFIPS line; armored-conductor transitions, not tape tension. Cites CN1707708B, CN108461277A, CN108597850A. Design-around: non-hydraulic/servo transition tooling. U-002, U-006.

title: Winding method for HTS coil
status_note: WO displays Ceased; family EP4430643B1 granted 2025-12-03, US/CN/JP/KR pending as displayed; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: shingle-overlap short-tape winding forming coil turns
indep_claim_gist: HTS field coil of multiple overlapping tapes forming turns around inner perimeter, each tape offset from adjacent tape, overlapping at least 50%, substrate separating turns.
notes: Placement-pattern (shingle) construction; tension not claimed. Live EP grant + pending CN member — claims can still grow in US/CN. Blocks shingle-laying cell feature only. U-002, U-005.

title: High temperature superconducting double pancake coil winding device
title_zh: 高温超导双饼线圈绕制装置
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2016-06-09) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: stepped-shaft double-pancake winding fixture, constant prestress
notes: Oldest CN SC-winding fixture found; constant-prestress DP tooling. Displays as expired — anchors expiry horizon of first-generation CN art; verify before reliance. Cited by US11581133B2.

title: Double-wire parallel-winding system for nuclear fusion poloidal field superconducting magnet manufacturing
title_zh: 一种用于核聚变极向场超导磁体制造的双线并绕系统
assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS
status_note: Displays as granted 2019-12-24 / active on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: dual-line PF conductor winding line with synchronized closed-loop control
notes: Full production-line claim (straightening 0.3mm/1000mm, bending 300ppm, +/-0.5mm reference-line accuracy, insulation wrap, rotary platform). CICC-conductor scale, not REBCO tape tension. U-006 context: institute owns line IP.

title: Use method of superconducting magnet single continuous winding and shaping device
assignee: Xi'an Juneng Superconducting Magnet Technology Co., Ltd.
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2041-01-25 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: jointless multi-coil sequential winding with pretension handoff fixtures
notes: Claims ending/handing off winding pretension state between successive coils via shaping splints. Jointless multi-coil theme, MRI-class. Abstract depth.

title: Co-Winding Machine for Pancake Coils and Co-Winding Method
status_note: Active, expires 2034-09-30 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: co-winding with independent dual tension, load-cell rollers, dual cassettes
indep_claim_gist: Pancake co-winding apparatus where taping wire of higher tensile strength is applied at tension exceeding the HTS wire tension, with independent tension control per feed onto rotating bobbin.
notes: Canonical independent-two-tension co-wind claim; KR-only found. Design-around: single-feed or >2-feed with profile control. Cited by CN107481854B lineage and KR102825078B1. U-007.

title: Alignment of HTS tapes
status_note: CA displays Pending; family US12260971B2/EP3847670B1/CN112955975B/KR102551778B1/JP7228680B2 granted as displayed; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: flipped-pair c-axis mirror-symmetric tape stacking in cable
notes: Static cable-level alignment (c-axis reflective symmetry averaging Ic variation), not winding-machine metrology. Granted CN member — CN family presence. Nearest art for camber/orientation hypotheses.

title: Wound HTS magnet coils
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2039-01-30 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: spiral-wound coil with HTS shunt cables placed between turns
notes: Placement-during-winding of shunt arcs between turns; no tension/machine claims. Continuation US11978587B2 live — scope can shift. U-005 context (TE captive machine channel).

title: High-temperature superconductive double-cake coil winding machine
assignee: Electric Power Research Institute of Guangdong Power Grid Co Ltd
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2037-09-22 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: feedback constant-tension double-tape DP winder, magnetic-powder + pressure sensors
indep_claim_gist: Dual-torque-motor winding machine with magnetic-powder controllers on motor shafts and pressure sensors at tension guide wheels; controller adjusts shaft speed from pressure feedback to hold constant tension while double-tape winding.
notes: Broadest fetched CN claim on sensor-feedback tension control in an HTS DP winder; sits in H01F41/094. Design-around: direct load-cell + servo profile control (non-constant setpoint). U-006, U-007.

title: Superconducting coil winding equipment
assignee: Zhongtian Group Shanghai Superconducting Technology Co Ltd (as displayed, with related entities)
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2039-07-31 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: multi-reel tape+insulation payoff with per-reel servo tension 0-200 N
indep_claim_gist: Winding equipment with coplanar multi-disk pay-off (SC tape and insulation reels), per-reel servo-controlled tension adjustment wheels (0-200 N), linear-guide-synchronized take-up with removable arrangement barrel for constant-tension multi-tape winding.
notes: Covers kilometer-spool payoff + co-feed mechanics in B65H class; explicit constant-tension multi-reel claim. Design-around: profiled (non-constant) tension, non-coplanar payoff. U-006, U-007, U-013.

title: Non-joint multi-cake coil winding machine
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2042-01-13 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: dual opposed axes jointless multi-pancake winding with tension-feedback coordination
notes: Two coordinated winding axes (one driven, one damped) with real-time tension sensor; jointless multi-pancake theme repeats CN112951584B/CN114360894B. Abstract depth.

title: Linear media handling systems and devices for production using the same
title_zh: 线性介质处理系统和使用其进行生产的装置
assignee: Electric Chaos LLC (orig. Infinite Physics LLC)
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2036-09-22 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: closed-loop axial tension stand with single load-cell wheel for brittle SC media
notes: US-origin CN grant; measured axial tension drives main control loop, ~160 deg wrap single sensing wheel, lateral in-plane constraint, bend-radius limits (MgB2/Nb3Sn cited). Generic precision respooling/winding stand claims read on tension benches. Abstract depth.

title: An winding system for high-temperature superconducting coil and winding method using of the same
status_note: Granted/active as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: laser-sensed external alignment guide compensating bobbin geometry during HTS winding
indep_claim_gist: Winding system whose external alignment guiding device moves the HTS wire widthwise to compensate position deviation between guide rollers and bobbins of varying shape, with laser position sensors and integrated tension/speed control.
notes: Closest found art to closed-loop placement metrology (2025 grant, KR-only found so far — watch family growth). Cites KR101597685B1. Does not claim camber/twist sensing or tension profiles. U-002, U-007.

title: Superconducting coil manufacturing apparatus and manufacturing method
status_note: Active, expires 2032-11-06 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: non-circular coil winding with constant-load pressing roller on slide guide
notes: Continuous non-circular (racetrack) winding without rotation stops; constant-load roller repositioning. Nearest JP art for non-planar handling mechanics. Cited-by includes JP7361613B2. Abstract depth.

title: No-insulation multi-width winding for high temperature superconducting magnets
status_note: Active, expires 2033-07-19 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: NI multi-width DP stack, no turn-to-turn insulation, graded tape widths
notes: Foundational NI architecture; no winding tension specified in claims — confirms tension->Rc gap. Expiry ~2033 opens NI-architecture space (displays active — verify before reliance). U-001, U-012 context.

title: A parallel winding device suitable for REBCO metal insulated coils
assignee: Hefei Xihe Superconducting Technology Co., Ltd. (transferred from Institute of Energy, Hefei Comprehensive National Science Center)
status_note: Displays as Pending on GP; claims can still change; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: constant-tension damper/weight parallel winder for REBCO + steel MI coils
indep_claim_gist: Device parallel-winding REBCO tape and stainless-steel strip with damper/weight constant-tension system, grooved guide-wheel discs keeping both strips coplanar, adjustable guide heights, threaded take-up shaft for varied formers.
notes: Merchant CN winder vendor (CS-B card 3) holds pending MI co-wind apparatus claims — the one CN merchant filing found. Pending: monitor. U-006, U-012.

title: Method for Controlling Turn-to-Turn Contact Resistance in REBCO Magnet Pancake Coils
assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation Inc
status_note: Displays as Pending on GP; claims can still change; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: Rc control via Sn-Pb dip coating + oxidized steel co-wind (materials route)
notes: THE nearest art to tension->Rc whitespace: controls Rc by solder/oxide coatings; claims do NOT mention winding tension as Rc control means (checked this run). P02 overlap flagged. U-001, U-007, U-012.

title: Parallel winding device and method for REBCO double-layer tape and insulating layer
assignee: Hefei Nuclear Polymagnet Technology Co Ltd (as displayed)
status_note: Displays as Pending on GP; claims can still change; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: dual-REBCO + polyimide co-feed with tension and length sensors, motor speed feedback
notes: Partial-insulation co-wind with real-time tension sensing + display/controller — closest CN art to instrumented (but still constant-setpoint) winding. Pending. Abstract depth.

title: Winding inspection method, winding inspection device, and manufacturing method of superconducting coil device
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: during-winding camera inspection with rotation-blur correction detecting filler voids
indep_claim_gist: Method acquiring images of rotating coil during winding, obtaining angular velocity from winding controller, correcting motion blur via computed surface velocity, detecting filler voids by differential image processing and binarization.
notes: Only found claim family doing optical QC DURING winding (MRI filler voids). Nearest art to during-winding QC (U-001); does not sense tape position/tension/Rc or act on feed. Design-around: different sensed quantity + closed-loop action.

title: Winding method of high-temperature superconducting coil double-belt double-cake
title_zh: 高温超导线圈双带双饼的绕制方法
assignee: Xi'an Juneng Superconducting Magnet Technology Co., Ltd.
status_note: Active, expires 2038-03-27 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: double-tape stacked DP winding method, positive/reverse cake sequencing
notes: Method claims on two-tape-superimposed DP winding under guide-wheel tension. Xi'an Juneng = repeat assignee (with CN112951584B). Abstract depth.

title: Winding method of closed-loop superconducting magnet and closed-loop superconducting magnet
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: transition/main reel alternating winding minimizing joints in closed-loop magnets
notes: 'Closed-loop' = persistent-loop magnet, not control loop (checked claims this run). Same-day CAS IEE sibling of CN114388259B. Abstract depth.

title: A superconducting coil strain monitoring device based on distributed optical fiber
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2042-12-20 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: distributed fiber strain monitoring embedded in coil edge epoxy
notes: Fiber embedded post-wind at coil edges (Stycast) for operational strain — NOT during-winding tension metrology. Nearest CN art bounding in-process strain sensing gap. U-001 adjacency; P04 overlap.

title: Superconducting flat tape cable magnet
assignee: Massachusetts Institute of Technology (US DOE confirmatory license displayed 2025-09-18)
status_note: Active, expires 2033-12-11 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: stacked-tape twist-wind (STTW) for 3D coil geometries
notes: Intentional controlled twisting along straight sections while winding (saddle/3D). Nearest art to twist handling; no camber sensing/correction claimed. ~2033 expiry horizon (displays active — verify before reliance).

title: Back tension applying device for winding wire and method for applying back tension
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (lapsed 2020-10) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: Euler-friction drum back-tension amplification for thick wire winding
notes: Representative of dense generic e-mobility winder-OEM tension estates (CS-A card 5 prior-art risk): rich mechanics prior art constrains apparatus claims but is copper-oriented and partly lapsing. Abstract depth.

title: Apparatus for quality control of a superconducting tape
status_note: Granted as US12050254B2 2024-07-30; family EP/JP/KR/CN granted as displayed; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: reel-to-reel cooled Ic measurement of tape with current/feed adjustment at defects
notes: CFS position-resolved tape QC: controller adjusts injected current and can reverse spool direction at defects — tape-level, upstream of winding. Nearest art bounding defect-map-aware WINDING absence (U-009, U-001). CN family member granted.
